hero.eyebrow: Clarity for real work, not just clock-ins
hero.title: Know your hours. Understand your earnings.
hero.subtitle: Alveryn turns every shift, task and completed unit into a clear picture of your time, income and progress.

problem.title: Your workday ends. The questions remain.
problem.body: When your work changes from day to day, rough notes are not enough. Alveryn keeps the useful answers close.
questions: How many hours did I actually work?
How much have I earned so far?
Am I working more than last month?
problem.answer: Alveryn keeps the answers ready — without notes, spreadsheets or calculations at the end of the month.

how.title: Log the work. Alveryn handles the numbers.
how.body: Add the work exactly as it happened. Alveryn calculates time, gross income, paid absences and progress from the data you enter.

steps.title: Select the type of work
steps.description: Choose an hourly shift, unit-based work or another configured work type.

steps.title: Enter hours or units
steps.description: Add start and end time, breaks, extra pay percentage or completed units.

steps.title: See the result immediately
steps.description: The app calculates worked time, estimated gross earnings and progress toward your rhythm.

analytics.title: See more than totals. See your pattern.
analytics.body: Statistics turn daily entries into trend lines, comparisons, forecasts and practical highlights.

items.title: Trends
items.description: Follow worked time, gross income, entries and worked days across the selected period.

items.title: Period comparisons
items.description: Compare this month with the previous month or use custom periods.

items.title: Forecast and highlights
items.description: Estimate the end of the active period and surface best days, long shifts and streaks.

items.title: Productivity and heatmap
items.description: See unit-based workload, configured pace and the days where activity was strongest.

workTypes.title: Made for the way you actually work.
workTypes.body: Alveryn supports hourly work, unit-based work and mixed days, so the history matches real life.

items.title: Hourly work
items.description: Track shifts, breaks, overnight work and extra pay percentages.
items.examples: Examples: regular shifts, admin time, night support.

items.title: Unit-based work
items.description: Track quantities that convert into equivalent work time.
items.examples: Examples: deliveries, rooms, orders, packages or completed tasks.

items.title: Mixed work
items.description: Combine multiple work types on the same day and keep the total clear.
items.examples: Examples: a shift, then evening admin, plus completed units.

calendar.title: Your entire working month, in one place.
calendar.body: The calendar shows worked days, empty days and absences together with monthly totals for hours, paid time and gross income.

final.title: Your work deserves more than a rough estimate.
final.subtitle: Start building a clear history of your hours, earnings and progress today.

images.dashboardAlt: Alveryn dashboard showing tracked entries, gross earnings and weekly rhythm.
images.entryAlt: Alveryn entry form with work type, time fields, break and extra pay percentage.
images.statisticsAlt: Alveryn statistics page with trend chart, insights, forecast, comparison, productivity and heatmap.
images.comparisonAlt: Alveryn comparison section comparing the current month with the previous month.
images.forecastAlt: Alveryn forecast card estimating end-of-period earnings.
images.productivityAlt: Alveryn productivity card showing unit totals and equivalent workload.
images.heatmapAlt: Alveryn activity heatmap showing stronger and lighter working days.
images.calendarAlt: Alveryn calendar page showing the month, work activity and absence markers.
